stack.frontend: React 18 CDN + Vanilla JS (no build step)

priority.critical: Blocks launch — must fix before go-live

legend.type: frontend | backend | database | ai | security | performance | testing | devops

modules.name: Authentication & User Management
modules.description: JWT-based auth for all three roles: customer, photographer, admin

tasks.title: JWT Register Endpoint
tasks.description: POST /api/auth/register — create customer or photographer account
subtasks: Hash password with bcrypt (saltRounds=10)
Block admin role on public register
Set isApproved=false for photographers
Return JWT token + user object on success
acceptance_criteria: Returns 201 with token on valid input
Returns 400 with errors array on invalid input
Duplicate email returns 400

tasks.title: Input Validation on Register
tasks.description: express-validator rules: email format, password min 6, name 2-50 chars, role enum
subtasks: email: isEmail + normalizeEmail
password: minLength 6
name: trim + isLength 2-50
role: optional, isIn(['customer','photographer'])
Return 400 with errors array on failure
acceptance_criteria: Invalid email returns 400 with field-level errors array
Password shorter than 6 chars returns 400
Invalid role value returns 400

tasks.title: JWT Login Endpoint
tasks.description: POST /api/auth/login — email+password auth, blocks unapproved photographers
subtasks: Find user by email
Compare password with bcrypt hash
Block photographer if isApproved=false (403)
Return token + user object (id, name, email, role)
acceptance_criteria: Valid credentials return 200 with token
Wrong password returns 400
Unapproved photographer returns 403

tasks.title: Auth Middleware (protect)
tasks.description: Verify Bearer JWT on protected routes, attach req.user
subtasks: Extract Bearer token from Authorization header
Verify with JWT_SECRET
Attach decoded payload to req.user
Return 401 on missing or expired token
acceptance_criteria: Missing token returns 401
Expired token returns 401
Valid token populates req.user with id and role

tasks.title: Role-Based Authorization Middleware
tasks.description: authorizeRoles(...roles) factory — block unauthorized roles with 403
subtasks: Check req.user.role against allowed roles array
Return 403 if not authorized
acceptance_criteria: Customer hitting admin route gets 403
Admin hitting admin route succeeds

tasks.title: Forgot Password Flow
tasks.description: POST /api/auth/forgot-password + POST /api/auth/reset-password
subtasks: Generate signed 1-hour reset token via crypto.randomBytes
Store hashed token + expiry on User document
Send reset link via nodemailer (configure SMTP_HOST, SMTP_USER, SMTP_PASS in .env)
POST /api/auth/reset-password: verify token, hash new password, clear token fields
Return 200 for unknown emails to prevent user enumeration
acceptance_criteria: Reset email sent for known email addresses
Unknown email returns 200 (no info leak)
Expired token returns 400
Valid token allows password change

tasks.title: Frontend — Login Page
tasks.description: login.html: form -> POST /api/auth/login -> store token + redirect by role
subtasks: Show loading spinner on submit
Display error message from API response
Store token as localStorage 'token', user object as 'user'
Redirect customer -> /customer-dashboard.html
Redirect photographer -> /photographer-dashboard.html
Redirect admin -> /admin-dashboard.html
acceptance_criteria: Successful login redirects to correct dashboard per role
Failed login shows error message inline
Token stored in localStorage

tasks.title: Frontend — Register Page
tasks.description: register.html: form -> POST /api/auth/register -> auto-login or show pending message
subtasks: Role selector: customer / photographer
Client-side validation mirroring backend rules
Show 'Pending admin approval' message for photographer registrations
Auto-login and redirect customer on success
Show field-level validation errors
acceptance_criteria: Photographer sees pending approval message after register
Customer auto-logged in and redirected to dashboard
Validation errors shown inline per field

tasks.title: Admin Creation Script
tasks.description: scripts/createadmin.js — seed admin user from CLI args
subtasks: Accept email and password from CLI args or env vars
Check for existing admin to prevent duplicates
acceptance_criteria: Running script creates admin user in DB
Re-running does not create duplicate

tasks.title: Homepage — Photographer Listing (index.html)
tasks.description: Paginated, filterable grid of photographers with Book button
subtasks: Search bar by name/specialization
Filters: city, event type, min/max price
Sort: rating, price asc/desc, newest
Pagination controls (prev/next + page numbers)
Photographer card: photo, name, city, price/hr, rating stars
Book button links to /photographer-profile.html?slug=...
acceptance_criteria: Filters update results without full page reload
Empty state message shown when no results match
Pagination meta (total, pages) rendered correctly

tasks.title: Photographer Public Profile Page
tasks.description: photographer-profile.html: full profile, portfolio, packages, availability, Book Now
subtasks: Fetch profile by ?slug= query param via GET /api/photographers/:slug
Display bio, specialization, city, experience, rating
Portfolio photo grid with lazy loading
Packages / pricing cards
Available dates calendar view
Book Now button: redirect to login if unauthenticated, else cart flow
Reviews section (most recent 5)
acceptance_criteria: Page loads correctly for valid slug
404/not-found state shown for invalid slug
Unauthenticated user redirected to login on Book Now

tasks.title: Customer Dashboard
tasks.description: customer-dashboard.html: orders, wishlist, profile, reviews tabs
subtasks: Tab: My Bookings — paginated order list with status badges
Tab: Wishlist — saved photographers with remove action
Tab: Profile — update name, phone, profile image
Tab: Reviews — reviews I have left
Cancel button for pending orders
Leave Review button for completed orders (opens review modal)
acceptance_criteria: Orders display with correct status badges
Review button only appears for completed orders without a review
Pagination works on orders list

tasks.title: Cart & Checkout Flow
tasks.description: Add to cart, view cart, apply coupon, proceed to payment
subtasks: Cart tab: list items with event date, type, location, duration, price
Remove item from cart
Coupon code input + apply (calls POST /api/coupon/apply)
Order summary: subtotal, discount, total
Proceed to Checkout button -> payment.html
acceptance_criteria: Cart persists across page refreshes (fetched from DB)
Applied coupon shows discount amount
Empty cart shows appropriate empty-state message

tasks.title: Payment Page — Dummy Credit Card + Manual Transfer
tasks.description: payment.html with dummy card form and manual bank transfer option
subtasks: Create payment.html in Creative Sketchbook design
Order summary section (items, subtotal, coupon discount, total)
Tab: Pay by Card — card number (XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX format), name, expiry MM/YY, CVV (show/hide toggle)
Tab: Manual Transfer — bank account details, upload proof of payment
Client-side card validation: 16 digits, expiry not in past
Submit calls POST /api/payments
Redirect to order-confirmation.html on success
acceptance_criteria: Card number formatted with spaces as user types
Past expiry date rejected before submission
Successful submission creates order and clears cart
Full card number never sent to or stored in backend

tasks.title: Order Confirmation Page
tasks.description: order-confirmation.html: show confirmed order details after payment
subtasks: Read orderId from URL ?orderId= query param
Fetch GET /api/orders/:orderId and display details
Show success animation
CTA buttons: View All Orders / Back to Home
acceptance_criteria: Order details displayed correctly from DB
Works for both card and manual payment

tasks.title: Review & Rating Submission
tasks.description: Modal after order completion: star rating + comment -> POST /api/reviews
subtasks: Interactive star rating widget (1-5, hover highlight)
Text comment field (max 1000 chars with counter)
POST /api/reviews on submit
Disable 'Leave Review' button after submission
Show submitted review inline in order card
acceptance_criteria: Review can only be submitted for completed orders
Rating widget is keyboard accessible
Review appears immediately after submission

tasks.title: Wishlist Toggle on Photographer Cards
tasks.description: Heart icon on cards and profile page toggles wishlist state
subtasks: Heart icon on photographer listings and profile page
Filled heart = in wishlist, outline = not in wishlist
POST /api/wishlist to add, DELETE /api/wishlist/:photographerId to remove
Load current wishlist state on page load for logged-in users
Prompt login for unauthenticated users
acceptance_criteria: Heart state persists across page reloads
Works only for logged-in users

tasks.title: GET /api/photographers — Search, Filter, Paginate
tasks.description: Paginated list with search, city, eventType, price range, sort
subtasks: Pagination: ?page=1&limit=10 (default limit 10, max 50)
Search by name/specialization (case-insensitive regex)
Filter by city (case-insensitive)
Filter by eventType array ($in query)
Filter by priceMin/priceMax range
Sort by rating, price asc/desc, experience, newest
Only return isPublished=true profiles
Return total count for pagination meta
acceptance_criteria: Returns photographers matching all active filters simultaneously
Returns correct total for pagination meta
Only published profiles returned on public route

tasks.title: GET /api/photographers/:slug — Public Profile
tasks.description: Fetch full photographer profile by slug
subtasks: Find PhotographerProfile by slug field
Populate userId for name, email, profileImage
Include Portfolio images array
Include Packages array
Include latest 5 Reviews with customer name
Return 404 if not found or isPublished=false
acceptance_criteria: Returns full profile data for valid slug
Returns 404 for unknown or unpublished slug
Response does not expose hashed password or sensitive fields

tasks.title: POST /api/orders — Create Order from Cart
tasks.description: Create order(s) from cart items with conflict check, clear cart
subtasks: Verify cart is not empty
For each cart item: check double-booking conflict (T05.04)
Create Order document with status=pending, paymentStatus=pending
Clear cart after all orders created
Return array of created order IDs
acceptance_criteria: Empty cart returns 400
Conflicting date/photographer returns 409
Cart cleared on success

tasks.title: GET /api/orders — Customer Orders (Paginated)
tasks.description: Get authenticated customer's orders with pagination and status filter
subtasks: Filter by customerId from JWT (customer sees only their own orders)
Optional ?status= filter (pending, confirmed, completed, cancelled)
Pagination: ?page=1&limit=10
Populate photographerId: name, email, profileImage
Return pagination meta: page, limit, total, pages
acceptance_criteria: Returns only orders for the authenticated customer
Pagination meta is correct
Status filter applied correctly

tasks.title: PATCH /api/orders/:id/cancel — Customer Cancel Order
tasks.description: Customer cancels a pending order, frees up slot
subtasks: Verify order belongs to authenticated customer
Allow cancel only if status is 'pending'
Set status='cancelled', cancellationReason from body, cancellationAt=now
Mark corresponding Availability slot as not booked
Emit Socket.io 'booking_cancelled' event to photographer's room
Add OrderTimeline entry
acceptance_criteria: Returns 400 if order is already confirmed or completed
Cancelled order status updates and persists
Availability slot freed up for rebooking
Photographer receives Socket.io notification

tasks.title: POST /api/reviews — Submit Review
tasks.description: Submit rating + comment for a completed order
subtasks: Validate: orderId belongs to authenticated customer
Validate: order status must be 'completed'
Prevent duplicate review: check existing Review for same orderId+customerId
Create Review document
Recalculate PhotographerProfile.rating (aggregate avg) and update totalReviews
acceptance_criteria: Returns 400 if order not completed
Returns 409 if review already exists for this order
PhotographerProfile.rating updated correctly after new review

tasks.title: Cart CRUD API
tasks.description: Add / view / remove / clear cart items
subtasks: POST /api/cart/add — add item (photographerId, eventDate, eventType, location, duration, pricePerHour, notes)
GET /api/cart — get current user's cart
DELETE /api/cart/remove/:itemId — remove single item
DELETE /api/cart/clear — clear all items
Auto-calculate totalCost on add/remove
acceptance_criteria: Cart is per-user (linked by userId from JWT)
totalCost is always correct
Removing non-existent item returns 404

tasks.title: Wishlist API
tasks.description: Add / remove / list wishlisted photographers
subtasks: POST /api/wishlist — add photographerId (no duplicates)
GET /api/wishlist — list with populated PhotographerProfile data
DELETE /api/wishlist/:photographerId — remove from wishlist
Toggle behavior: add if absent, remove if present
acceptance_criteria: No duplicate photographer entries per user
GET response includes populated photographer details

tasks.title: POST /api/coupon/apply — Validate and Apply Coupon
tasks.description: Validate coupon code, return discount details
subtasks: Find Coupon by code (case-insensitive)
Check isActive=true
Check expiryDate is in future
Check usageCount < maxUses
Return discountType (percentage/fixed) and value
Increment usageCount when order is created with coupon
acceptance_criteria: Expired coupon returns 400 with message
Max-used coupon returns 400
Valid coupon returns discount type and value

tasks.title: Photographer Dashboard
tasks.description: photographer-dashboard.html: overview, bookings, profile, portfolio, availability, packages, earnings
subtasks: Stats cards: total earnings, pending bookings, completed shoots, rating
Incoming bookings table: accept / decline actions
Profile editor: bio, city, specialization, event types, pricePerHour
Portfolio: image upload grid with delete option
Availability calendar: mark available/unavailable day slots
Packages section: add/edit/delete packages
Earnings tab: revenue chart + breakdown table
acceptance_criteria: Stats reflect real DB data on load
Accept/decline updates DB and removes row from pending list
Portfolio images rendered in grid

tasks.title: Portfolio Image Upload UI
tasks.description: Multi-file upload with preview, validation, and progress
subtasks: Multi-file input: accept jpg, png, webp
Client-side: reject files > 5MB and non-image types before upload
Show thumbnail previews before upload
Upload progress indicator per file
POST /api/photographers/portfolio (multipart/form-data)
Delete icon on each uploaded image calls DELETE /api/photographers/portfolio/:id
acceptance_criteria: Invalid file type rejected client-side before upload
Uploaded images appear in portfolio grid immediately
Delete removes image from both UI and server

tasks.title: Availability Calendar UI
tasks.description: Interactive monthly calendar to set available/unavailable dates and time slots
subtasks: Monthly calendar grid (built with CSS Grid, no external dependency needed)
Click a day to toggle available (green) / unavailable (grey)
Already-booked days shown as red (not clickable)
Half-day option toggle (morning/afternoon)
Save button calls POST /api/availability with selected dates
Load existing availability on calendar render
acceptance_criteria: Booked dates displayed in red and cannot be changed
Saved availability persists after page reload
Calendar navigates between months

tasks.title: Pricing Packages Manager
tasks.description: Create/edit/delete service packages (Basic, Standard, Premium)
subtasks: Packages listed as cards with edit/delete buttons
Create form: name, description, price (PKR), duration (hours), features (chip input)
POST /api/packages, PUT /api/packages/:id, DELETE /api/packages/:id
Packages appear on public profile page automatically
acceptance_criteria: New package appears on public profile within 5 seconds of save
Price must be a positive number
At least one package must exist before profile can be published

tasks.title: Earnings Dashboard
tasks.description: Revenue chart, payout summary, commission breakdown
subtasks: Total gross earnings, platform commission, net earnings summary cards
Pending payout amount
Bar chart: earnings by month for last 6 months (Chart.js)
Completed shoots table: date, client, amount, commission, net
acceptance_criteria: Commission correctly deducted from gross in all displays
Chart renders last 6 months correctly
Data matches what admin sees in Commission panel

tasks.title: GET + PUT /api/photographers/profile — Profile CRUD
tasks.description: Get and update own photographer profile
subtasks: Create profile document if it does not exist on first PUT
Validate pricePerHour is a positive number
Validate eventTypes is an array of allowed values
Auto-generate URL-safe slug from user name if slug not set
Return complete profile in response
acceptance_criteria: Profile created on first update call
Slug is unique across photographers
Profile returned in full for GET

tasks.title: Portfolio Image Upload API
tasks.description: POST /api/photographers/portfolio — multer upload, return served URL
subtasks: Install multer and configure disk storage to backend/uploads/
Validate file MIME type (jpeg, png, webp only — check buffer, not extension)
Limit file size to 5MB per file in multer config
Generate UUID-based filename to prevent path traversal
Save file paths to Portfolio model linked to photographerId
Serve uploads/ directory as express.static
DELETE /api/photographers/portfolio/:id — delete file from disk and DB
acceptance_criteria: Non-image files rejected with 400
Images accessible at /uploads/uuid.jpg
Deleting removes file from disk

tasks.title: Availability CRUD API
tasks.description: GET/POST/DELETE /api/availability — manage available dates
subtasks: Availability schema: photographerId, date, isFullDayUnavailable, slots:[{startTime,endTime,isBooked}]
Compound unique index: {photographerId:1, date:1}
GET /api/availability/:photographerId?month=YYYY-MM — return month availability
POST /api/availability — set availability for a date
DELETE /api/availability/:date — mark date unavailable (cannot delete if slot is booked)
acceptance_criteria: Booked slots cannot be deleted
Returns correct availability for requested month
Conflict check used in order creation flow

tasks.title: Double Booking Prevention
tasks.description: Atomic conflict check before creating any order
subtasks: Before order creation: Order.findOne({ photographerId, eventDate, status: { $nin: ['cancelled'] } })
Return 409 'This photographer is already booked on that date' if conflict found
Also check Availability.isFullDayUnavailable for manual blocks
Use findOneAndUpdate with conditions for atomicity to prevent race conditions
acceptance_criteria: Second booking for same photographer+date returns 409
First booking proceeds normally
Cancellation frees up slot for rebooking

tasks.title: PATCH /api/orders/:id/accept and /decline — Respond to Booking
tasks.description: Photographer accepts or declines an incoming order
subtasks: Verify req.user is the assigned photographer for this order
Accept: set status='confirmed', acceptedAt=now
Decline: set status='cancelled', cancellationReason='Photographer declined'
Emit Socket.io 'booking_accepted' or 'booking_declined' event to customer room
Create OrderTimeline entry for each status change
acceptance_criteria: Only assigned photographer can accept/decline
Wrong photographer gets 403
Customer receives live Socket.io notification
Order status changes correctly and immediately

tasks.title: Packages CRUD API
tasks.description: Full CRUD for photographer service packages
subtasks: GET /api/packages/:photographerId — public, no auth required
POST /api/packages — create (photographer auth, owns via JWT)
PUT /api/packages/:id — update (photographer auth, own package only)
DELETE /api/packages/:id — delete (photographer auth, own package only)
acceptance_criteria: Photographer can only CRUD their own packages
Packages visible publicly on profile page without auth
Attempting to modify another photographer's package returns 403

tasks.title: Photographer Earnings Summary API
tasks.description: GET /api/commission/photographer — net earnings for logged-in photographer
subtasks: Aggregate completed Orders for photographerId
Deduct platform commission percentage (configurable in .env COMMISSION_RATE)
Group by month for last 6 months (chart data)
Return: gross, commissionAmount, net, pendingPayout
acceptance_criteria: Only completed orders included
Monthly breakdown has correct 6 data points
Net amount matches gross minus commission

modules.name: Admin Portal — Frontend
modules.description: React 18 CDN admin SPA with 9 tabs

tasks.title: Admin Dashboard — 9-Tab SPA
tasks.description: admin-dashboard.html: React 18 with auth guard and full management UI
subtasks: JWT decode on load — redirect to login if not admin
Tab: Dashboard — stat cards + recent activity + pending approvals with approve/reject
Tab: Photographers — searchable table with approve/reject/suspend/reinstate
Tab: Users — customer list table (requires T07.02 backend endpoint)
Tab: Analytics — Chart.js line + bar + doughnut charts
Tab: Disputes — slide-out drawer with resolve action
Tab: Commission — payout queue with Mark Paid button (requires T07.07 backend)
Tab: FAQs — full CRUD with modal
Tab: Coupons — full CRUD with modal
Tab: Settings — platform config + change password form
acceptance_criteria: Non-admin users redirected to /login.html
All tabs load data from properly authenticated API calls
Actions (approve/reject) update the list immediately without full reload

tasks.title: Admin Users Tab — Wire to Backend
tasks.description: Connect Users tab to GET /api/admin/users endpoint (currently missing)
subtasks: Call GET /api/admin/users?role=customer&page=1&limit=20 on tab open
Render table: name, email, role, createdAt, isActive status badge
Block/Unblock button calls PATCH /api/admin/users/:id/block or /unblock
Pagination controls
acceptance_criteria: All customers listed with pagination
Block action visually reflects in table immediately

tasks.title: Admin Commission — Wire Mark Paid Button
tasks.description: Connect Mark Paid button to PATCH /api/commission/:id/pay
subtasks: On click: PATCH /api/commission/:id/pay
Update row status to 'Paid' in UI on success
Move paid entries to separate section or dim them
Show success toast
acceptance_criteria: Mark Paid persists after page reload
Paid amount no longer shown in pending total

modules.name: Admin Portal — Backend API
modules.description: Admin-only API endpoints for platform management

tasks.title: GET /api/admin/photographers — Paginated List
tasks.description: List all photographers with pagination ?page=1&limit=20
subtasks: Returns photographers + pagination: {page, limit, total, pages}
Limit capped at 100
acceptance_criteria: Returns correct pagination meta
Admin-only route (403 for non-admin)

tasks.title: GET /api/admin/users — All Customers
tasks.description: List all customer accounts with search and pagination
subtasks: User.find({ role: req.query.role || 'customer' }).select('-password')
?search= filter by name or email (regex)
?page and ?limit pagination (default page=1, limit=20)
Return pagination meta
Admin-only (authorizeRoles('admin'))
acceptance_criteria: Returns only customers by default
Name/email search works
Non-admin gets 403

tasks.title: PATCH /api/admin/users/:id/block + /unblock
tasks.description: Admin block/unblock user accounts
subtasks: PATCH /block: set User.isActive=false
PATCH /unblock: set User.isActive=true
Auth middleware must check isActive on every request (T01.06)
acceptance_criteria: Blocked user's next API call returns 403
Admin can unblock user

tasks.title: PATCH /api/admin/photographers/:id/suspend + /reinstate
tasks.description: Suspend or reinstate a photographer account
subtasks: Suspend: isActive=false, isApproved=false, isPublished=false on PhotographerProfile
Reinstate: isActive=true, isApproved=true, isPublished=true
Suspended photographer hidden from public GET /api/photographers
acceptance_criteria: Suspended photographer no longer in public listing
Admin can reinstate suspended photographer

tasks.title: GET /api/admin/analytics — Platform Stats
tasks.description: Aggregate stats for admin dashboard analytics tab
subtasks: Total customers, total photographers (approved/pending/suspended breakdown)
Total orders by status
Total platform revenue (sum of commission amounts from completed orders)
Monthly booking counts for last 12 months (array of 12 numbers)
Top 5 photographers by total completed bookings
Use MongoDB aggregation pipeline with indexed fields
acceptance_criteria: All stats computed server-side with aggregation
Monthly array always has exactly 12 data points
Endpoint returns in < 500ms (due to indexes)

tasks.title: Dispute CRUD API
tasks.description: Create, list, and resolve disputes
subtasks: POST /api/disputes — customer reports dispute (auth required)
GET /api/disputes — admin lists all disputes with ?status filter and pagination
PATCH /api/disputes/:id — admin resolves: set resolution text, status='resolved', resolvedBy, resolvedAt
Emit Socket.io 'dispute_resolved' to both customer and photographer rooms
acceptance_criteria: Dispute list paginated
Resolution stored with admin user ID and timestamp
Both parties notified via Socket.io

tasks.title: Commission Payout API
tasks.description: Auto-create commissions on order completion; admin marks paid
subtasks: Commission document auto-created when order status changes to 'completed'
Commission rate pulled from COMMISSION_RATE .env variable (default 10%)
GET /api/commission — admin: list pending and paid commissions with pagination
PATCH /api/commission/:id/pay — admin marks commission paid: status='paid', paidAt=now
GET /api/commission/photographer — photographer sees own earnings (net after commission)
acceptance_criteria: Commission created automatically on order completion
Paid commissions excluded from pending payout totals
COMMISSION_RATE configurable without code change

tasks.title: FAQ CRUD API
tasks.description: Admin manages FAQs; public reads them
subtasks: GET /api/faq — public, no auth, returns active FAQs
POST /api/faq — admin only, create FAQ
PUT /api/faq/:id — admin only, update
DELETE /api/faq/:id — admin only, soft or hard delete
acceptance_criteria: Public can read FAQs without auth
Non-admin POST/PUT/DELETE returns 403

tasks.title: Coupon CRUD API
tasks.description: Admin manages coupons; customers apply them
subtasks: GET /api/coupon — admin list all coupons
POST /api/coupon — create: code, discountType (percentage|fixed), value, expiryDate, maxUses
PUT /api/coupon/:id — update
DELETE /api/coupon/:id — delete
POST /api/coupon/apply — customer validates code (see T03.09)
Reject duplicate coupon codes
acceptance_criteria: Duplicate coupon code returns 400
Expired or maxed coupon returns 400 on apply

modules.name: AI Agent — Chatbot
modules.description: Groq-powered chatbot with real-time DB querying and NLP intent extraction

tasks.title: Chatbot Widget — Frontend (chatbot.js)
tasks.description: Self-contained floating chatbot IIFE loaded on all pages
subtasks: 56px trigger button with pulse badge after 4 seconds
380x560px fixed chat window with hard shadow
Message bubbles with timestamps
Bounce-dot loading animation during API call
Quick reply chips: Find Photographer, My Orders, How to Book, Refund Policy
Photographer card rendering (Polaroid style with name, city, price, rating)
Order timeline rendering (vertical dashed timeline)
XSS-safe rendering via esc() function (no innerHTML with user data)
Bearer token sent with every POST /api/chat call
Redirect to /login.html on 401 response
Rolling 6-message conversation history passed to API
acceptance_criteria: Chatbot loads on index.html, customer-dashboard, photographer-dashboard, photographer-profile
Renders photographer cards from API response
Rate limit error (429) shown as friendly message

tasks.title: Chatbot Backend — POST /api/chat
tasks.description: Intent detection, DB query, Groq call, structured response
subtasks: Classify intent: photographer_search | booking_status | faq | general
photographer_search: extract params (city, budget, eventType) -> query PhotographerProfile -> pass results to Groq as context
booking_status: query Orders for authenticated user
FAQ intent: load active FAQs, pass as Groq system context
Rate limit: 20 req/min per IP (done)
Structured response: { success, type, message, photographers?, bookings?, timeline?, cart? }
acceptance_criteria: Natural language photographer query returns real DB results as cards
Order status query returns correct data for authenticated user
Groq API errors handled with fallback message

tasks.title: NLP Parameter Extraction
tasks.description: Extract structured params (city, budget, eventType, date) from natural language
subtasks: First Groq call: extract JSON {city, maxBudget, eventType, date} from user message
Fallback regex patterns for Pakistani cities (Lahore, Karachi, Islamabad, Rawalpindi, etc.)
Handle Roman Urdu: 'lahore mein', 'karachi se', 'islamabad ka'
Map eventType aliases: 'shadi' -> 'wedding', 'nikah' -> 'wedding', 'product shoot' -> 'product'
Validate extracted params before building MongoDB query (prevent injection)
acceptance_criteria: Query 'lahore mein shadi 15k' extracts city=Lahore, eventType=wedding, maxBudget=15000
Unknown city falls back to nationwide search
Extracted params sanitized before DB query (no operator injection)

tasks.title: AI Automated Support — FAQ Integration
tasks.description: Use DB FAQs as context for Groq to answer policy questions
subtasks: Fetch active FAQs from DB on server start (cache in memory, refresh every 10 min)
Inject FAQ content into Groq system prompt for FAQ-type intents
Handle: refund policy, cancellation policy, how to book, payment methods
Do not hallucinate — instruct Groq to only use provided FAQ context for policies
acceptance_criteria: Refund policy answer matches admin FAQ content exactly
Chatbot does not invent policies
FAQ cache refreshes when admin updates FAQs

tasks.title: Chatbot Edge Case Handling
tasks.description: Graceful degradation for all failure scenarios
subtasks: No photographers found matching filters: 'I couldn't find photographers for those filters. Try a wider budget or different city.'
Groq API timeout (> 5s): 'I'm a bit slow right now, please try again in a moment.'
Unauthenticated order query: 'Please log in to check your order status.'
Rate limit hit (429): 'You're sending messages too fast! Please wait a minute.'
Empty message: 'What can I help you with today?'
Groq returns empty response: default fallback general greeting
acceptance_criteria: Zero unhandled exceptions visible to user
All edge cases show meaningful, user-friendly messages

tasks.title: Chatbot — Analytics Event Tracking
tasks.description: Track chatbot interactions as analytic events in DB
subtasks: Log Analytic event for each chatbot query: action='chatbot_query', photographerId (if photographer search)
Track which intents are most used
Show chatbot usage in admin analytics
acceptance_criteria: Chatbot queries appear in admin analytics data
Analytic events linked to userId if authenticated

tasks.title: User Schema + Indexes
tasks.description: email (unique), role index added
subtasks: userSchema.index({ email: 1 }, { unique: true })
userSchema.index({ role: 1 })
acceptance_criteria: email index is unique
role index exists in Atlas UI

tasks.title: PhotographerProfile Schema + Indexes
tasks.description: 7 indexes including compound index for listing page query
subtasks: userId unique index
city, eventTypes, rating, pricePerHour, isPublished individual indexes
Compound: { isPublished: 1, rating: -1, city: 1 } for listing page query
acceptance_criteria: 7 indexes confirmed in Atlas
Compound index covers listing page query pattern

tasks.title: Order Schema + Indexes
tasks.description: Indexes for status, customerId, photographerId, eventDate
subtasks: status: 1 index
{ customerId: 1, status: 1 } compound
{ photographerId: 1, status: 1 } compound
eventDate: 1 index
acceptance_criteria: 4 indexes confirm in Atlas
Double-booking query uses index (photographerId + eventDate)

tasks.title: Review Schema + Indexes
tasks.description: photographerId, customerId indexes and unique compound for anti-duplicate
subtasks: photographerId: 1 field-level index (done)
customerId: 1 field-level index (done)
reviewSchema.index({ bookingId: 1, customerId: 1 }, { unique: true }) — prevent duplicate reviews
acceptance_criteria: Duplicate review on same order rejected at DB level with E11000
3 indexes confirmed in Atlas

tasks.title: Analytic Schema + Indexes
tasks.description: Already fully indexed — verified, no changes needed
subtasks: Confirmed: photographerId, action, timestamp, (photographerId,timestamp), (action,timestamp) compound indexes
acceptance_criteria: All 5 indexes present in Atlas

tasks.title: Availability Schema
tasks.description: Per-photographer per-day availability with slot booking
subtasks: Fields: photographerId (ref User), date (Date), isFullDayUnavailable (Boolean), slots: [{startTime, endTime, isBooked, orderId}]
Compound unique index: { photographerId: 1, date: 1 }
Ensure slot booking is atomic using findOneAndUpdate with $ operators
acceptance_criteria: Only one document per photographer per day (unique index enforces this)
Slot booking atomic — no race condition on concurrent requests

tasks.title: Package Schema
tasks.description: Photographer service packages model
subtasks: Fields: photographerId (ref PhotographerProfile), name (String), description (String), price (Number, min:0), durationHours (Number), features ([String]), isActive (Boolean, default:true)
Index: { photographerId: 1 }
acceptance_criteria: Package linked to photographer
price validated as positive number at schema level

tasks.title: Commission Schema
tasks.description: Track platform commission per completed order
subtasks: Fields: orderId (ref Order, unique), photographerId (ref User), grossAmount, commissionRate (Number), commissionAmount, netAmount, status ('pending'|'paid'), paidAt (Date)
Index: { photographerId: 1, status: 1 }
Auto-create commission document via post-save hook on Order when status -> 'completed'
acceptance_criteria: Commission auto-created whenever order status changes to 'completed'
commissionRate stored at booking time (historical record)
unique orderId index prevents duplicate commissions

tasks.title: Dispute Schema
tasks.description: Track disputes between customers and photographers
subtasks: Fields: orderId (ref Order), reportedBy (ref User), againstUserId (ref User), reason (String), description (String, max:2000), status ('open'|'under_review'|'resolved'), resolution (String), resolvedBy (ref User), resolvedAt (Date)
Index: { status: 1, createdAt: -1 }
acceptance_criteria: Dispute linked to specific order
Resolution includes admin user reference and timestamp

tasks.title: OrderTimeline Schema
tasks.description: Append-only audit log of order status changes
subtasks: Fields: orderId (ref Order), status (String), note (String), changedBy (ref User), timestamp (Date, default:now)
Index: { orderId: 1, timestamp: 1 }
acceptance_criteria: Timeline entry added on every Order status change
Chatbot can render timeline from GET /api/orders/:id/timeline

tasks.title: Portfolio Schema
tasks.description: photographer portfolio images model
subtasks: Fields: photographerId (ref User), imageUrl (String), caption (String optional), sortOrder (Number, default:0)
Index: { photographerId: 1, sortOrder: 1 }
acceptance_criteria: Images linked to photographer
sortOrder enables reordering gallery

modules.name: Payment System
modules.description: Manual payment flow + dummy credit card UI (no real gateway)

tasks.title: Payment Page UI (payment.html)
tasks.description: Dedicated payment page with dummy card form and manual bank transfer option
subtasks: Create payment.html with Creative Sketchbook design system
Order summary section: items list, subtotal, coupon discount, total
Tab switcher: 'Pay by Card' / 'Manual Bank Transfer'
Card tab: number input (live 4x4 formatting), cardholder name, expiry MM/YY, CVV (show/hide icon)
Card client-side validation: 16-digit number, expiry not in past, CVV 3-4 digits
Manual tab: show bank account details, file upload for payment proof
Submit: POST /api/payments with { orderId, method, last4 (card only) }
Redirect to /order-confirmation.html?orderId=... on success
acceptance_criteria: Card number formats automatically with spaces
Past expiry date blocked before API call
No full card number sent to or stored in backend
Successful submission clears cart and redirects to confirmation

tasks.title: Payment Model & API
tasks.description: Record payment, update order paymentStatus
subtasks: Payment schema: orderId (ref Order, unique), userId, amount, method ('card'|'manual'), last4 (String, 4 chars max), status ('pending'|'confirmed'), confirmedAt
POST /api/payments: create Payment, for 'card' set Order.paymentStatus='paid', for 'manual' keep 'pending'
PATCH /api/admin/payments/:id/confirm: admin confirms manual payment (status='confirmed', Order.paymentStatus='paid')
Index: { orderId: 1 } unique, { status: 1 }
acceptance_criteria: Full card number never stored — only last 4 digits accepted
Card payment immediately marks Order as paid
Manual payment awaits admin confirmation
Duplicate payment for same order rejected by unique index

tasks.title: Order Confirmation Page
tasks.description: order-confirmation.html: show order details post-payment
subtasks: Read orderId from URL ?orderId= param
Fetch GET /api/orders/:orderId and render details
Success checkmark animation (CSS)
For manual payment: show 'Payment pending confirmation' message
CTA: View All Orders | Browse More Photographers
acceptance_criteria: Order details displayed correctly
Manual payment shows pending state clearly
Card payment shows confirmed state

tasks.title: Admin Manual Payment Confirmation
tasks.description: Admin reviews and confirms manual bank transfer payments
subtasks: GET /api/admin/payments?status=pending — list unconfirmed manual payments
PATCH /api/admin/payments/:id/confirm — set Payment.status='confirmed', Order.paymentStatus='paid'
Add Payments tab or section in admin dashboard
acceptance_criteria: Admin can see list of pending manual payments
Confirming updates both Payment and Order records

modules.name: Security Hardening
modules.description: OWASP Top 10 mitigations and platform security best practices

tasks.title: Helmet.js — HTTP Security Headers
tasks.description: Add helmet middleware to set secure HTTP headers on all responses
subtasks: npm install helmet
app.use(helmet()) before all route declarations
Configure Content-Security-Policy: allow CDN sources (React, Chart.js, Google Fonts, socket.io CDN)
Verify X-Frame-Options: SAMEORIGIN
Verify Strict-Transport-Security in production
acceptance_criteria: Security headers present in all API and static file responses
CDN resources (React, Chart.js) not blocked by CSP
Helmet does not break existing frontend functionality

tasks.title: CORS Restriction — Production Origin Whitelist
tasks.description: Restrict CORS to known frontend origin in production environment
subtasks: Add FRONTEND_URL to .env (e.g. https://snapbook.netlify.app)
app.use(cors({ origin: process.env.FRONTEND_URL || '*', credentials: true }))
In production (NODE_ENV=production): reject requests from unknown origins
acceptance_criteria: In production, API requests from other origins return 403
Development keeps wildcard CORS for ease

tasks.title: MongoDB Injection Prevention (express-mongo-sanitize)
tasks.description: Strip $ and . operators from request body and query params
subtasks: npm install express-mongo-sanitize
app.use(mongoSanitize()) immediately after app.use(express.json())
Verify: { email: { $ne: null } } in body is stripped to {}
acceptance_criteria: NoSQL injection via $where or $ne stripped before reaching controllers
Legitimate requests pass through unmodified

tasks.title: Input Validation on All Write Endpoints
tasks.description: Extend express-validator to all POST/PUT/PATCH endpoints
subtasks: Create backend/middleware/validators.js with reusable validation rule sets
POST /api/orders: eventDate must be future, eventType enum, duration 1-24, location non-empty
POST /api/reviews: rating isInt {min:1, max:5}, comment isLength {max:1000}
POST /api/disputes: reason non-empty, description isLength {max:2000}
POST /api/coupon: code isAlphanumeric, value isFloat {min:0}, expiryDate isISO8601 and future
POST /api/availability: date isISO8601
Apply consistently: router.post('/route', validators.ruleSet, controller.handler)
acceptance_criteria: All endpoints return 400 with errors array on invalid input
Past eventDate rejected on order creation
Rating > 5 rejected on review submission

tasks.title: File Upload Security — MIME Type Validation
tasks.description: Validate file type from buffer (not extension) for portfolio uploads
subtasks: npm install file-type
In multer fileFilter: read first bytes, check real MIME type
Only allow: image/jpeg, image/png, image/webp
Limit: 5MB max per file (multer limits.fileSize)
Use uuid v4 as filename to prevent path traversal
acceptance_criteria: Malicious file renamed to .jpg is rejected at buffer level
File > 5MB rejected with 413
No user-controlled characters in stored filename

tasks.title: Rate Limiting — Auth Endpoints (Brute Force Protection)
tasks.description: Prevent brute-force attacks on login and register
subtasks: POST /api/auth/login: rateLimit({ windowMs: 15*60*1000, max: 10 }) — 10 attempts/15min per IP
POST /api/auth/register: rateLimit({ windowMs: 60*60*1000, max: 5 }) — 5 registrations/hour per IP
Both limiters return 429 with Retry-After header
acceptance_criteria: 11th login attempt in 15 min returns 429
Retry-After header present
Chatbot limiter (20/min) already done — verify not affected

tasks.title: Strengthen JWT Secret
tasks.description: Replace weak JWT_SECRET with cryptographically random 64-byte value
subtasks: Generate: node -e "console.log(require('crypto').randomBytes(64).toString('hex'))"
Replace current 'supersecretjwtkey123' in .env
Add .env to .gitignore immediately
Create .env.example with placeholder values
Note: all existing tokens invalidated — users must re-login
acceptance_criteria: JWT_SECRET is 128 hex characters (64 random bytes)
.env not tracked in git
.env.example committed instead

tasks.title: XSS Prevention Audit
tasks.description: Ensure all user-generated content is properly escaped before rendering
subtasks: Chatbot: esc() function used for all message/name rendering (done)
React dashboards: JSX interpolation auto-escapes (done)
Non-React pages (index.html, photographer-profile.html): audit all .innerHTML usage
Replace .innerHTML with .textContent or DOMParser for user-sourced strings
Review comments: ensure escaped before display in HTML context
acceptance_criteria: <script>alert(1)</script> in review comment renders as literal text in all pages
No dangerousSetInnerHTML in React pages with user data

tasks.title: Production .gitignore Setup
tasks.description: Ensure sensitive files and large folders are not committed
subtasks: Add backend/.env to .gitignore
Add backend/uploads/ to .gitignore
Add node_modules/ to .gitignore (both backend and root)
Add .DS_Store, *.log to .gitignore
Verify: git status shows no .env files tracked
acceptance_criteria: git status shows .env as untracked/ignored
npm install works from scratch using package.json only

modules.name: Performance Optimization
modules.description: Frontend and backend performance improvements for sub-3s page loads

tasks.title: Image Lazy Loading
tasks.description: Add loading='lazy' and dimensions to all img elements
subtasks: Add loading='lazy' to all photographer card photos in react-app.js
Add loading='lazy' to all portfolio grid images
Add explicit width and height attributes to prevent CLS (Cumulative Layout Shift)
Use aspect-ratio CSS property on image containers
acceptance_criteria: Images below the fold load on scroll, not on page load
No layout shift when images load (CLS score < 0.1)

tasks.title: Response Compression (gzip)
tasks.description: Compress all API and static file responses
subtasks: npm install compression
app.use(compression()) before routes in server.js
Verify Content-Encoding: gzip in response headers
acceptance_criteria: API JSON responses gzip compressed
HTML/JS/CSS static files compressed
Response size reduced by 60-80%

tasks.title: Ensure All List Endpoints Are Paginated
tasks.description: Audit all GET endpoints returning arrays — enforce max 100 results
subtasks: GET /api/photographers: paginated (done)
GET /api/orders: paginated (done)
GET /api/admin/photographers: paginated (done)
GET /api/admin/users: add pagination (pending — T07.02)
GET /api/disputes: verify or add pagination
GET /api/commission: verify or add pagination
GET /api/reviews/:photographerId: verify or add pagination
GET /api/analytics/events: add ?limit (default 100, max 500)
acceptance_criteria: No single endpoint returns > 100 documents in one response
All list endpoints accept ?page and ?limit query params

tasks.title: Photographer List API Caching
tasks.description: Cache GET /api/photographers responses by query string for 60 seconds
subtasks: Use node-cache (npm install node-cache) with TTL=60
Cache key = MD5 or JSON.stringify of query object
Bust cache when PhotographerProfile updated or approved/suspended
Add X-Cache: HIT/MISS response header for debugging
acceptance_criteria: Second identical request served from cache (verified by X-Cache: HIT)
Cache busted when photographer data changes

tasks.title: WebP Image Conversion on Upload
tasks.description: Convert uploaded portfolio images to WebP format using sharp
subtasks: npm install sharp
After multer saves file: sharp(originalPath).webp({ quality: 80 }).toFile(webpPath)
Delete original non-WebP file after conversion
Store WebP path in Portfolio model
acceptance_criteria: All portfolio images served as .webp
File size reduced by ~30-50% vs original JPEG

modules.name: Real-Time Features (Socket.io)
modules.description: Live notifications for booking status changes and disputes

tasks.title: Socket.io Authenticated Room Management
tasks.description: Each user joins their private room (userId) on socket connect; verify JWT on connect
subtasks: Client sends JWT in socket handshake auth: io({ auth: { token } })
Server-side: verify JWT in io.use() middleware before connection
socket.join(userId) to private room on successful auth
Reject unauthenticated socket connections with disconnect error
Emit targeted events: io.to(userId).emit('event', data)
acceptance_criteria: Socket notification only received by intended user
Unauthenticated socket connections rejected immediately

tasks.title: Real-Time Notifications — Frontend
tasks.description: Connect socket.io client on dashboards and show toast notifications
subtasks: Include socket.io client CDN in customer and photographer dashboard HTML
Connect with: io({ auth: { token: localStorage.getItem('token') } })
Customer listens for: booking_accepted, booking_declined, dispute_resolved
Photographer listens for: new_booking, booking_cancelled
Show toast notification (slide-in from top-right, auto-dismiss 5s)
Update order list in place when booking status changes (no full reload)
acceptance_criteria: Customer gets live toast when photographer accepts booking
Photographer gets live toast when new booking arrives
Toast includes action button (e.g., 'View Order')

modules.name: Bug Fixes & Known Issues
modules.description: All currently identified bugs that must be resolved before launch

tasks.title: BUG: Admin Users Tab Has No Backend Endpoint
tasks.description: GET /api/admin/users not implemented; admin Users tab returns empty/error
subtasks: Implement GET /api/admin/users in adminController.js
Register route in adminRoutes.js
Update admin dashboard Users tab fetch URL
acceptance_criteria: Admin can see paginated customer list
No console error on Users tab open

tasks.title: BUG: Commission 'Mark Paid' Button Has No Backend
tasks.description: Admin commission Mark Paid button is UI-only — no PATCH endpoint exists
subtasks: Implement PATCH /api/commission/:id/pay
Wire the admin dashboard button to call this endpoint
Verify paid status persists on dashboard reload
acceptance_criteria: Mark Paid persists after page reload
Paid commissions excluded from pending totals

tasks.title: BUG: Blocked Users Can Still Authenticate with Valid Token
tasks.description: isActive=false not checked in auth middleware — blocked users can still call APIs
subtasks: Fetch user from DB in protect middleware after JWT verification
Return 403 if user.isActive === false
Test: block user, then call protected endpoint with their existing token
acceptance_criteria: Blocked user immediately gets 403 on next API call
Previously issued tokens are invalidated by block status

tasks.title: BUG: Photographer Rating Not Recalculated After Review
tasks.description: Submitting a review does not update PhotographerProfile.rating average
subtasks: After Review.create(), run MongoDB aggregation: $avg of rating for photographerId
Update PhotographerProfile: { rating: avgRating, totalReviews: count }
Test: submit 3 reviews with ratings 4, 5, 3 — profile should show rating=4.0
acceptance_criteria: Profile rating updates immediately after review submission
Average is mathematically correct to 1 decimal place

tasks.title: BUG: Double Booking Not Prevented
tasks.description: No conflict check before order creation — same photographer can be double-booked
subtasks: In orderController.createOrder: check Order.findOne({ photographerId, eventDate, status: { $nin: ['cancelled'] } })
Return 409 with message 'Photographer already booked on this date'
Add to chatbot: handle 'is [photographer] available on [date]' queries
acceptance_criteria: Second booking for same photographer+date returns 409
First booking proceeds without change

tasks.title: BUG: Weak JWT Secret in .env
tasks.description: Current JWT_SECRET is 'supersecretjwtkey123' — guessable and insecure
subtasks: node -e "console.log(require('crypto').randomBytes(64).toString('hex'))"
Update JWT_SECRET in .env with generated value
Add .env to .gitignore before any git operations
Note: all current user sessions will be invalidated
acceptance_criteria: JWT_SECRET is 128 hex characters minimum
.env is in .gitignore and not staged

tasks.title: BUG: Cart Not Cleared if Order Creation Partially Fails
tasks.description: If creating orders for multiple cart items fails mid-loop, cart is partially cleared
subtasks: Collect all created orders first; only clear cart after all succeed
Wrap loop in try/catch; if any item fails, rollback by deleting created orders
Return 207 Multi-Status with success/failure per item if partial failure is acceptable
acceptance_criteria: All cart items succeed: cart cleared, all orders created
Any item fails: no orders created (rollback), cart preserved, 400 returned

tasks.title: BUG: No Price Range Filter in GET /api/photographers
tasks.description: priceMin and priceMax filters not implemented despite being in UI
subtasks: Parse ?priceMin and ?priceMax from query
Add to filter: if priceMin: { pricePerHour: { $gte: priceMin } }, if priceMax: { pricePerHour: { $lte: priceMax } }
Validate: priceMin and priceMax must be positive numbers
acceptance_criteria: ?priceMin=5000&priceMax=20000 returns only photographers in that range
Invalid values (negative, non-numeric) return 400

modules.name: Testing & QA
modules.description: Manual end-to-end test checklists for all major flows

tasks.title: Auth Flow — Complete Test Matrix
tasks.description: Test all authentication and authorization scenarios
subtasks: Register new customer -> verify 201 with token
Register with invalid email -> verify 400 with errors array
Register with password < 6 chars -> verify 400
Register with role='admin' -> verify 400 (blocked)
Register photographer -> verify isApproved=false
Photographer login before admin approval -> verify 403
Admin approves photographer -> photographer login succeeds
Wrong password login -> verify 400
Customer hits /api/admin route -> verify 403
Admin blocks user -> verify blocked user gets 403 with valid token
acceptance_criteria: All 10 scenarios behave exactly as specified

tasks.title: Booking Flow — Happy Path End-to-End
tasks.description: Complete booking lifecycle from search to completed review
subtasks: Search photographer with city + eventType filters
View photographer profile via slug
Add photographer to cart with event details
Apply valid coupon code
Proceed to payment page — enter dummy card
Submit payment -> verify Order created, Cart cleared
Photographer logs in, sees new booking, clicks Accept
Customer gets Socket.io notification
Admin marks order as completed
Customer leaves 4-star review
Verify PhotographerProfile.rating updated
acceptance_criteria: Complete happy path works without any errors or redirects
Each step transitions to next correctly

tasks.title: Double Booking Prevention Test
tasks.description: Verify photographer cannot be booked twice for the same date
subtasks: Book photographer A for 2026-07-10
As a different customer: attempt booking photographer A for 2026-07-10
Verify 409 response with 'already booked' message
Verify different date for same photographer succeeds (200)
Cancel first booking -> verify same date is now bookable again (200)
acceptance_criteria: Second booking returns 409
After cancellation, slot is rebookable

tasks.title: AI Chatbot Test Matrix
tasks.description: Test chatbot with all intent types and edge cases
subtasks: 'Find wedding photographer in Lahore under 20k' -> photographer cards rendered
'Mujhe kal Karachi mein portrait photographer chahiye' -> photographer cards
'What is my order status?' (logged in) -> order list rendered
'What is my order status?' (not logged in) -> prompt to login
'What is your refund policy?' -> FAQ-based answer
'Hello' -> general greeting
21 requests in 1 minute -> 429 on 21st with friendly message
'<script>alert(1)</script>' as message -> escaped in output, no XSS
acceptance_criteria: All 8 scenarios return expected response type and format

tasks.title: Security Penetration Test Checklist
tasks.description: Manually test all OWASP mitigations
subtasks: POST /api/auth/register body: { email: { $ne: null } } -> verify field sanitized
POST /api/auth/register name: '' -> verify escaped in response
Upload file: rename shell.php to shell.jpg -> verify 400 (MIME check)
Upload file: 6MB image -> verify 413 or 400
GET /api/orders without token -> verify 401
GET /api/admin/photographers as customer -> verify 403
POST /api/orders with eventDate='2020-01-01' (past) -> verify 400
POST /api/reviews with rating=10 -> verify 400
11th login attempt in 1 minute -> verify 429 with Retry-After
acceptance_criteria: All 9 attack vectors blocked with correct status codes

tasks.title: Pagination Correctness Test
tasks.description: Verify all paginated endpoints return correct data and metadata
subtasks: GET /api/photographers?page=1&limit=3 -> verify 3 results + total in meta
GET /api/photographers?page=2&limit=3 -> verify next 3 unique results
GET /api/orders?page=1&limit=2 -> verify 2 results + pagination meta
GET /api/admin/photographers?page=1&limit=5 -> verify 5 results + correct total
GET /api/photographers?page=9999 -> verify empty array not error
acceptance_criteria: Page counts and result counts match DB counts exactly
Out-of-range page returns empty array (not error)

tasks.title: Admin Operations Test
tasks.description: Test all admin dashboard CRUD operations
subtasks: Login as admin -> dashboard loads with correct stats
Approve photographer -> isApproved=true, photographer can now login
Reject photographer -> isApproved=false
Suspend photographer -> photographer hidden from public GET /api/photographers
Reinstate photographer -> photographer visible again
Create FAQ -> appears on GET /api/faq without auth
Create coupon -> POST /api/coupon/apply with correct code returns discount
Resolve dispute -> status='resolved' persists
acceptance_criteria: All 8 admin operations execute without errors
All state changes persist after dashboard reload

tasks.title: Real-Time Notifications Test
tasks.description: Verify Socket.io notifications delivered to correct users
subtasks: Open customer dashboard in browser A
Open photographer dashboard in browser B
Browser C (customer A) books photographer B
Verify photographer B sees new_booking toast in browser B
Photographer B accepts in browser B
Verify customer A sees booking_accepted toast in browser A
acceptance_criteria: Notifications delivered within 2 seconds
No cross-user notification leakage

tasks.title: Environment Configuration
tasks.description: Complete .env with all required variables for production
subtasks: MONGO_URI: Atlas production cluster URI
JWT_SECRET: 64-byte random hex (see T14.06)
GROQ_API_KEY: from console.groq.com
NODE_ENV=production
PORT=5055
FRONTEND_URL: production domain (e.g. https://snapbook.netlify.app)
COMMISSION_RATE=10 (platform commission percentage)
SMTP_HOST, SMTP_PORT, SMTP_USER, SMTP_PASS (for forgot password emails)
Create backend/.env.example with placeholder values (commit this)
acceptance_criteria: .env.example committed with all keys but no real values
.env listed in .gitignore

tasks.title: .gitignore Setup
tasks.description: Comprehensive .gitignore to prevent sensitive/large files from git tracking
subtasks: backend/.env
backend/node_modules/
frontend/node_modules/ (if any)
backend/uploads/ (user uploaded portfolio images)
.DS_Store
*.log
*.pem
dist/ and build/ folders
acceptance_criteria: git status shows .env as untracked and ignored
git status shows uploads/ as untracked and ignored

tasks.title: Backend Deployment (Render.com Recommended)
tasks.description: Deploy Express backend to cloud provider
subtasks: Create account on Render.com (free tier available)
Create new Web Service, point to backend/ directory
Set Build Command: npm install
Set Start Command: node server.js
Set all environment variables in Render dashboard (not in code)
Configure health check at GET /api
Test all endpoints after deployment with production URL
acceptance_criteria: Backend accessible at https://snapbook-api.onrender.com (or similar)
All env vars set in platform, not hardcoded

tasks.title: Frontend Deployment (Netlify Recommended)
tasks.description: Deploy static frontend to CDN-backed hosting
subtasks: Update API base URL in all frontend JS files to production backend URL
Create netlify.toml with redirect rule: /* -> /index.html (SPA fallback)
Deploy frontend/public/ directory to Netlify
Configure custom domain if available
Enable HTTPS (automatic on Netlify)
acceptance_criteria: Frontend loads at production HTTPS URL
All API calls hit production backend (no localhost references)
SPA routing works for /customer-dashboard, etc.

tasks.title: MongoDB Atlas Production Hardening
tasks.description: Secure Atlas cluster for production traffic
subtasks: Whitelist only Render.com server IPs in Atlas Network Access (not 0.0.0.0/0)
Create dedicated DB user with readWrite on specific DB only (not admin)
Enable Atlas automated backups (daily snapshots)
Set up Atlas alerts for: connection count > 50, long query > 1s
Use separate Atlas projects for dev and prod environments
acceptance_criteria: DB not accessible from arbitrary IPs
Dedicated non-admin DB user used
Automated backups enabled

critical_path_before_launch: T14.03 — Block inactive users in auth middleware
T11.06 — Rate limiting on login/register endpoints
T16.09 — Add .env to .gitignore (before any git push)
T10.01 + T10.02 — Payment page UI and API
T04.03 — Availability calendar UI for photographers
T07.02 — Admin get all users endpoint
T14.04 — Photographer rating recalculation after review
T15.02 — Booking flow happy path test
modules_100_percent_complete: None — all modules have pending or in-progress tasks
modules_closest_to_done: M07 — Admin Backend API (3/9 done, most critical ones done)
